title: Varen’s Mark
bodyText: The black void on Varen's hand — now past his wrist. Grew visibly when **Eddy's oath flared** (S08, radiant damage). Burns near the Eight Legs' star-signs. Kena escaped the same mark by amputation. Is it Lolth's brand on deserters, Eilistraee's price, or a disease with a divine vector? "King John had this... and died."
